ab: O manan ko sa katayni no miso?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Romakatay kako tayni.
en: I came on foot.

ab: O manan ko nikalican iso a paliding?
en: A: What kind of car did you take?

ab: O paso ko nikalican ako a tayni.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: samanen iso tayra i kiwkay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Pakalican no wama no mako a tayra.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: O manan ko saka tayra ningra i pitilidan to romi’ami’ad?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: O mimokmokay a  kasoling ko sakatayra ningra i pitilidan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: O manan ko sakatayra no fofo iso a miaca to dateng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Ci ongtofayay cingra a miaca to dateng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: O manan ko sakatayra iso i Fotod?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: O tamina ko saka tayra ako i Fotod.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: samanen ningra tayra i Fotod?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: O hikoki ko saka tayra ningra i Fotod.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: O manan ko nikalican ningra tayra I Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: O pafesocay a kasoling ko sakatayra ningra i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: o kasoling ko sakatayra ningra i Posong haw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Hai, o kasoling ko sakatayra ningra i Posong.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: o kasoling ko sakatayra ningra i Posong haw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Cowa, o hikoki ko sakatayra ningra i Posong.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: Iraay ko siyataw no paso itini haw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Iraay, moecel han ko rakat, manengneng to ko siyataw no paso.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: I cowaay ko mangataay no mimokmokay a kasoling no siyataw itini?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Awaay ko mimokmokay a kasoling itini , pakahaya sa kiso.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Halafin a mikalic to paso tayra i pitilidan haw?
ch: A:搭公車多久會到學校嗎?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Mo^tep ira ko lima a efon tahila i pitilidan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Mikalic to pafesocay a kasuling ,hacowa a tahila i Taycong?
ch: A:搭要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Cecay ko toki tahila i Taycong.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: parakat to paliding halafing a tahila i Olay haw?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Cecay ko tatokian a tahila.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Mikalic to mimokmokay  a kasoling kiso i, hacowa a tahini i loma’ ako?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Tosa polo a ehon
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mafana’ay kiso citingsiya haw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mafana’ay kako citingsiya.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Iraay ko ongtofay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Iraay ko ongtofay ako.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Iraay ko ongtofay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Awaay ko ongtofay ako.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
